###_COMMENT_1: This configuration defines the server-side federated learning workflow
###_COMMENT_2: using FedProx aggregation strategy for nnU-Net medical image segmentation
###_USER_MODIFY_1: === TODO: USER_MODIFY === Adjust num_rounds based on your training requirements
###_USER_MODIFY_2: === TODO: USER_MODIFY === Set min_clients to the number of clients you have

components.###_COMMENT_PRETRAINED_1: Server loads the same pretrained weights as clients in Round 0
components.###_COMMENT_PRETRAINED_2: This ensures w_global = pretrained weights for optimal FedProx performance

args.###_COMMENT_STORAGE_1: 只保存2个NVFLARE格式模型：FL_global_model.pt (最新) + FL_global_model_best.pt (最佳)
args.###_COMMENT_STORAGE_2: 需要nnU-Net格式时使用: python convert_fl_to_nnunet.py
args.###_COMMENT_STORAGE_3: 以下参数已废弃但保留以兼容旧代码

model.###_COMMENT: Model definition - uses a simple wrapper since we load nnU-Net architecture from clients

args.###_USER_MODIFY_3: === TODO: USER_MODIFY === Adjust model save path if needed

components.###_COMMENT_FEDPROX_1: FedProx uses weighted averaging aggregation (same as FedAvg)
components.###_COMMENT_FEDPROX_2: The proximal term is applied on the CLIENT side during training
components.###_COMMENT_FEDPROX_3: Server simply aggregates the client models
components.###_COMMENT_FEDPROX_4: CRITICAL: weigh_by_local_iter=true enables NUM_STEPS_CURRENT_ROUND based weighting

args.###_USER_MODIFY_4: === TODO: USER_MODIFY === Change key_metric if using different validation metric

workflows.###_COMMENT_WORKFLOW_TYPE: ScatterAndGather workflow orchestrates federated learning rounds

args.###_USER_MODIFY_5: === TODO: USER_MODIFY === Increase train_timeout if training takes longer (0 = no timeout)
